channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: 10 Top AI Stocks Poised for Explosive Gains in 2026 as Spending Hits $2.5 Trillion
item.description: Investors are focusing on top AI stocks like NVIDIA and Microsoft, as global AI spending is projected to reach $2.5 trillion by 2026, driven by infrastructure and generative tool adoption. [Microsoft, Nvidia]

item.title: Alphabet sells yen bonds worth $3.6 billion, largest such issue by foreign company
item.description: Alphabet has issued a record-breaking 576.5 billion yen ($3.6 billion) in yen-denominated bonds, marking its first such debt offering. This move supports its substantial AI investment program and funding diversification efforts. The issuance saw strong demand… [Alphabet]

item.title: Foxconn projects 30% capex growth in 2026 amid robust AI demand
item.description: Foxconn (Hon Hai) posted a first-quarter net profit of NT$49.92 billion ($1.58 billion), representing a 19% increase from the previous year and a 10% rise from the final quarter of 2025

item.title: Microsoft Israel Head to Resign Following Probe into Military Cloud Dealings
item.description: Alon Haimovich, the general manager of Microsoft Israel, will leave the company following an internal inquiry that examined whether Microsoft’s Azure cloud platform was used by Israeli military intelligence Unit 8200 for mass surveillance of Palestinian phone… [Microsoft, Intel]
